nodes.name: TikTok Comment Webhook
nodes.notes: TikTok sends POST requests when a new comment is created. Configure this URL in your TikTok Developer App → Webhooks → video.comment.create

nodes.name: Post Comment Reply
nodes.notes: TikTok DM API is restricted to approved partners. This node replies PUBLICLY to the comment with the event link. To send private DMs, apply for TikTok Business API partner access.
